subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Good to hear from you again, and thanks for following up after the conference. We’d be glad to schedule a 30-minute call to discuss a potential partnership.

The following time windows are available next week:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those works well, just let us know your preference and we can take it from there.

As for direct internal contact details, I’m not able to share private email addresses or phone numbers for internal personnel. Please use the contact information available on our public website for any additional outreach.

Best regards,
AI Assistant
